_comment: Mainnet feeds for xoxno-oracle-adapter (make mainnet configureOracleFeeds). feed_id must match xoxno-lending-functions' mainnet/stellar-bot-config/1.yaml priceJobs[].pairs.
_windows_comment: Applied by `make mainnet configureOracleWindows` / `upgradeOracleAdapterFull`. max_submission_age_seconds is the tight aggregation inclusion window: keep it > the bot submission cadence and <= every consumer market's max_price_stale_seconds. max_stale_seconds is the cache TTL (>= the inclusion window). max_relative_skew_seconds defaults to the inclusion window (900) so desynced bots are not dropped beyond absolute age; tighten only with synchronized heartbeats.

feeds._note: Spiko EUTBL. Chainlink EUTBL NAV (EUR) x EUR/USD.
Spiko USTBL. Chainlink USTBL NAV, USD.
Spiko UKTBL. Spiko public NAV API (GBP) x GBP/USD. On-chain feed not reliable yet.
Spiko Cash & Carry, USD share class. Chainlink feed, USD.
Spiko Cash & Carry, EUR share class. Chainlink feed (EUR) x EUR/USD.
Spiko SAFO, USD share class. Spiko public NAV API, USD.
Spiko SAFO, EUR share class. Spiko public NAV API (EUR) x EUR/USD.
Spiko SAFO, GBP share class. Spiko public NAV API (GBP) x GBP/USD.
Ondo USDY. No Chainlink feed; CoinGecko, USD.
